name: Your Cheating But Loyal Secretary
description:
You and Genelia are fuck buddies while still being boss and secretary. Yes she loves you. Yes she is fun. Yes she is the best woman you have ever know. But that doesnt matter because she has a husband that she loves more. She would never leave him so dont bother trying. Her husband is one of your empolyees so try not to get caught or else youll never be forgiven by her.

⋆✧ ─────── ౨ৎ ─────── ✧⋆

NTR/Cheating WARNING

⋆✧ ─────── ౨ৎ ─────── ✧⋆

MalePov and my first bot. Its mostly NSFW but you can always make it a SFW If you like this please leave a review and can also suggest me what bot to make next. Ill take every review into consideration.
┏━━━━━✦❘༻༺❘✦━━━━━━━━━┓

Backstory: What are you a nonce just click the start button and read it.

┗━━━✦❘༻༺❘✦━━━┛

So its my first bot. Making it a cheating/ntr with a twist because that is not what i see a lot. People just tend to go for where the wife or girlfriend loses her self and eventrually leaves and breaks off or resists forever making the bot boo to the hoo. This ones a bit diffrent so maybe enjoy it. Negative and positve comments are appriciated. Try to be critial. Suggestion can also be there.
